questions.question: What is the primary goal of Page Rank in web analytics?
options: To identify the most visited pages on a website
To analyze the structure of a website
To rank web pages based on their importance
questions.explanation: Page Rank is a link analysis algorithm used to evaluate the importance of web pages.

questions.question: Which type of web analytics involves analyzing links between web pages?
questions.explanation: Link Mining is the process of analyzing links between web pages to gain insights into web behavior.

questions.question: What is the primary focus of Text Mining in web analytics?
options: Analyzing text data on web pages
questions.explanation: Text Mining involves analyzing text data on web pages to extract insights and patterns.

questions.question: Which type of web analytics involves analyzing data from web usage patterns?
questions.explanation: Web Usage Analytics involves analyzing data from web usage patterns to gain insights into user behavior.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of Web Mining in web analytics?
options: To analyze links between web pages
questions.explanation: Web Mining involves analyzing data from web pages to gain insights into web behavior and patterns.
